import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 18, 
    'description': 'v18 reactive: detector>0.05 or dist<3.5 triggers follow (0.28 base speed-match +0.25*err, -6.5*angle, reduce linear if |angle|>success*1.5); pure-rotate at >0.4rad; OA only if detector<0.3+min_front<0.8 (left/right w//3 bias, valid>0.05); aggressive seek=0.9 if far; backup <0.8m. Uses abs config paths + dataset.data_path to fix rom=None error. Improved thresholds for longer safe streaks.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v18 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v18 refines follow/seek/OA thresholds, alignment-aware speed, depth patches for better human tracking and accumulation toward 500 safe steps.')
